prestazioni: M13A naturally aspirated 1.6L engine (125 PS stock) with a HKS Hi-Power Super SQV IV blow-off valve and custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header by Tomei, paired with a full titanium 3-inch exhaust system featuring a Burns Stainless muffler for optimized scavenging and 15-18 PS gain at 7,000 RPM

K&N Typhoon cold air intake with a custom heat-shielded velocity stack and a custom-tuned ECU reflash via EcuTek ProECU, targeting 13.5:1 AFR at peak torque (4,500 RPM) and 12.8:1 at redline (7,200 RPM), with ignition timing advanced to 22° BTDC for maximum power without detonation

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 7kg/mm rear springs, custom valving for the ZC33S chassis, and adjustable top mounts for camber adjustment up to -3.5°, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear adjustable sway bars to eliminate body roll in high-G corners
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the ZC33S, featuring carbon fiber overfenders with aggressive 30mm flares, a custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a duckbill rear wing with adjustable angle for downforce tuning (up to 40kg at 120 km/h)

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 17x7.5 +45 wheels in matte gunmetal, wrapped in 215/40R17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 12mm rear) to fill the Rocket Bunny arches and achieve a 5mm flush fitment

Custom livery by Fatlace Designs featuring a 'Jungle Green' base with hand-painted 'Suzuki Racing Heritage' stripes in gold leaf, a carbon fiber hood with a functional NACA duct for engine bay cooling, and a full interior retrim in Alcantara with green stitching and Recaro SRD-E bucket seats
